title: zapoteca formosa subsp. gracilis
intro: Zapoteca formosa subsp. gracilis, also known as Zapote, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Zapoteca formosa subsp. gracilis include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Zapoteca formosa subsp. gracilis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots of the plant in hot water.
